response.overview: In the blue glow of his screen, a man drifts between cam feeds and porn loops, his desires digitized. What began as connection becomes mechanical release. Playpart #6 is a portrait of erotic isolation in the age of infinite screens.  Conceived as an experiment in editing a film while masturbating, the work explores compulsion, fragmented attention and the unstable boundary between spectator and participant.
response.title: Playparty #6
